mapper.select: SELECT W.WORD_NO AS wordNo, W.WORD_TEXT AS wordText, W.FURIGANA AS furigana, W.PART_OF_SPEECH AS partOfSpeech, W.JLPT_LEVEL AS jlptLevel, W.WORD_DESCRIPTION AS wordDescription, WM.MEANING_TEXT AS meaningText FROM WORD W LEFT JOIN WORD_MEANING WM ON W.WORD_NO = WM.WORD_NO AND WM.MEANING_ORDER = 1 AND WM.DELETE_FL = 'N' WHERE W.DELETE_FL = 'N' ORDER BY W.WORD_NO
